positive: Minimalist symmetrical geometric arrangement of woodland creatures: a fox, a badger, and a squirrel are intertwined with stylized abstract leaves and berries. The design should utilize negative space effectively, featuring clean, bold outlines and solid silhouettes against a clean background. Style: Modern flat vector illustration, inspired by Nordic folk art and Scandinavian graphic design. Color Palette: Muted forest greens, earthy ochre, deep navy blue, and ivory white. Composition: Centralized emblem format, perfect for apparel repeat or large print placement. Lighting/Atmosphere: High contrast, graphic, and clean. High detail, vector perfection, print-ready.
